sections.title: After Making Friends with My Arm and delivering fire notes

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Snowflake and My Arm are ruling the town together, and now I've built them a special fire, they can grow goutweed there.

lines.speaker: Wolfbone
lines.text: I plan to stay here, in the Stronghold, with my friend Burntmeat, but it good to hear of my home. Thank you.

lines.speaker: Burntmeat
lines.text: Stronghold trolls not all that interested in firemaking, after all, but t'anks for bringing book anyway. It taste lovely.
